mapper.select: select rights_template_id as rightsTemplateId, valid_days as validDays, quota_value as quotaValue from jst_rights_template where rights_template_id = #{rightsTemplateId} and status = 1 and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select count(1) from jst_user_rights ur left join jst_rights_template rt on rt.rights_template_id = ur.rights_template_id and rt.del_flag = '0' where ur.source_ref_id = #{exchangeId} and ur.del_flag = '0' and ( ur.status = 'used' or ur.remain_quota < ifnull(rt.quota_value, ur.remain_quota) )
mapper.update: update jst_user_rights set remain_quota = 0, status = 'revoked', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where source_ref_id = #{exchangeId} and status in ('available', 'locked') and del_flag = '0'
